title: 共享单车
description_uz: «Metro bekatiga velosipedda boraylik.» — Ikki do'st ijara velosiped haqida suhbatlashadi: kodni skanerlab to'lash, egarni sozlash, xavfsiz haydash, yo'l vaqti va to'g'ri to'xtatish. Bu dialog taklif berish, yo'l-yo'riq ko'rsatish va maslahat berishni mashq qiladi. Transport mavzusidagi amaliy so'zlarga boy. Rol o'ynash uchun ajoyib.
description_ru: «Давай доедем до станции метро на велосипеде.» — Двое друзей говорят о велосипеде каршеринга: оплата сканированием кода, регулировка сиденья, безопасная езда, время в пути и правильная парковка. Диалог тренирует предложения, инструкции и советы. Богат практичной транспортной лексикой. Отлично подходит для ролевой игры.
description_en: «Let's ride bikes to the subway station.» — Two friends talk about shared bikes: paying by scanning the code, adjusting the seat, riding safely, travel time, and parking correctly. The dialogue practices making suggestions, giving instructions, and advice. Rich in practical transport vocabulary. Great for role-play.

sentences.pinyin: Wǒmen qí chē qù dìtiě zhàn ba.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Давай доедем до станции метро на велосипеде.
sentences.text_translation_en: Let's ride bikes to the subway station.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好的，路边就有共享单车。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de, lùbiān jiù yǒu gòngxiǎng dānchē.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, yo'l chetida ijara velosipedlar bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, у обочины как раз есть велосипеды каршеринга.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure — there are shared bikes right by the roadside.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_ru: В каком приложении ты сканируешь код?
sentences.text_translation_en: Which app do you scan the code with?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yòng Zhīfùbǎo jiù xíng, hěn fāngbiàn.
sentences.text_translation_en: Alipay works fine — it's very convenient.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Zhè liàng chē de zuò yǒudiǎn gāo.
sentences.text_translation_ru: У этого велосипеда сиденье немного высоковато.
sentences.text_translation_en: This bike's seat is a bit high.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 座位可以调，往下按就行。
sentences.pinyin: Zuòwèi kěyǐ tiáo, wǎng xià àn jiù xíng.
sentences.text_translation: Egarni sozlash mumkin, pastga bossang bo'ldi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сиденье можно отрегулировать, просто нажми вниз.
sentences.text_translation_en: The seat can be adjusted — just press it down.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ qí màn diǎn, zhùyì ānquán.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Qí duōjiǔ néng dào dìtiě zhàn?
sentences.text_translation: Velosipedda metro bekatiga qancha vaqtda yetamiz?
sentences.text_translation_en: How long does it take to bike to the subway station?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_translation_en: When we get there, where do we park?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Dìtiě kǒu pángbiān yǒu tíngchē qū.
sentences.text_translation: Metro kirish yonida to'xtash joyi bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Рядом со входом в метро есть парковочная зона.
sentences.text_translation_en: There's a parking area next to the subway entrance.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 共享单车真是省钱又环保。
sentences.pinyin: Gòngxiǎng dānchē zhēnshi shěng qián yòu huánbǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Ijara velosipedlar chindan ham arzon va ekologik toza.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Велосипеды каршеринга и правда экономят деньги и экологичны.
sentences.text_translation_en: Shared bikes really do save money and are eco-friendly.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 是啊，不远的话骑车最好了。
sentences.pinyin: Shì a, bù yuǎn de huà qí chē zuì hǎo le.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, uzoq bo'lmasa velosipedda borish eng yaxshisi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, если недалеко, лучше всего ехать на велосипеде.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, if it's not far, biking is the best.
sentences.speaker: B
